reviews.comment:
Realmente deja mucho que desear , la atención es malísima les encanta hacer esperar a la gente , siempre tienen un pero para atender , la tarjeta no anda , estamos cerrando el turno, tenemos que lavar , y cuando no se internan en el fondo a charlar , una vergüenza

(Translated by Google)
It really leaves a lot to be desired; the service is terrible. They love making people wait, always finding an excuse to avoid serving them: "The card isn't working," "We're closing our shift," "We have to do the laundry," and when they're not doing that, they're just sitting in the back chatting. It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5372606000038803063/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3Z3Q2N3NnRRAB
